case_title: CITY HOUSING, INC. VS. SHAWN MCCARRICK et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MCCARRICK, SHAWN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
MINUTES FOR NOV-19-2001 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 414
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MCCARRICK, SHAWN

ASSIGNED DEPT. 414 TRIAL, NO APP. BY DEF. WIT. S/E, DOC. EVID. INTROD./WITHDRAWN. JUDGMENT FOR PLTF. AGNST. DEF. SHAWN MCCARRICK FOR RESTITUTION OF PREMISES 34-6TH ST., #202; DAMAGES $420, COSTS $96, PER DIEM HOLDOVER $15 & FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT. JUDGE: SUSAN BREALL; CLERK: SANDRA STARK; REPORTER: KAREN BAUER

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCARRICK, SHAWN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 34-6TH STREET, #202 $420.00 RENT, $96.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $516.00, LEASE FORFEITED, PER DIEM HOLDOVER OF $15.00.
